description:
Production observability dashboard for job-producer. Covers API request health, job production throughput, Kafka producer performance, latency percentiles, error budget indicators, and JVM/process resource pressure.

How to use this dashboard: Start from the top Overview row to verify SLO health, then drill into throughput, latency, errors, and capacity sections to isolate bottlenecks. Use the template filters (environment, instance, topic, job type, endpoint, and command where available) to narrow scope during incidents and compare behavior across dimensions. Panel info icon meaning: Click the i icon in each panel header to see what the metric represents, how to interpret normal vs abnormal values, and what operational signal it provides.

panels.description: Total jobs accepted and recorded by job-producer over the selected time range.
panels.title: Jobs Produced (range)

panels.description: Current job production rate from custom business metric.
panels.title: Job Production Rate

panels.description: Current Kafka producer send rate from Kafka client metrics.
panels.title: Kafka Send Rate

panels.description: Kafka producer record error rate. Should remain close to zero.
panels.title: Kafka Error Rate

panels.description: HTTP error ratio across the selected endpoints (excluding actuator).
panels.title: HTTP Error %

panels.description: Target availability for the selected instance set.
panels.title: Target Availability

panels.description: Flow of submitted jobs into Kafka with error and retry context.
panels.title: Job Production vs Kafka Send/Error/Retry

panels.description: Business throughput split by topic and job type.
panels.title: Produced Rate by Job Type and Topic

panels.description: Kafka producer throughput and network traffic into the broker.

panels.description: Producer efficiency: request sizing and records-per-request at runtime.

panels.description: Job-producer API latency percentiles across filtered endpoints.

panels.title: Top 10 Endpoints by p95 Latency

panels.title: Kafka Template Latency (p50/p90/p95/p99)

panels.description: HTTP exception taxonomy extracted from `http_server_requests_seconds_count` exception tag.
panels.title: Exception Rate by Type

title: Job Producer
